addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt Sitemaps package
Added static XML sitemap generation for maximum performance
Added support for Joomla Articles sitemaps
Added support for DevArt Business sitemaps
Added support for DevArt Events sitemaps
Added support for DevArt Video sitemaps
Added archive sitemap generation with monthly splitting
Added scheduled sitemap generation using Joomla Scheduled Tasks
Added build history and activity logging
Added dashboard with sitemap and scheduler status information
Added rebuild, continue, stop and clear operations
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support

change.item: Built using modern Joomla 6 MVC architecture and PHP 8.2+
Optimized sitemap generation for high-performance and low server load
Separated sitemap generation by provider for improved scalability
Improved archive generation for large websites with monthly XML files
Optimized database queries and build process for very large datasets
Improved compatibility with Cloudflare and CDN environments

security.item: Added ACL support for administrator operations
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added SQL parameter binding for all database operations
Added secure file generation and XML writing
Added validation for sitemap generation tasks and provider operations
Built for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+ using modern namespaces and production-safe architecture

note.item: Initial public stable release of DevArt Sitemaps for Joomla 6
Built for Joomla 6 only with PHP 8.2+
Optimized for large websites, news portals and enterprise deployments
Always test on a staging environment before production deployment
